sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in the left hand, particularly with gripping. He also reports a cough and occasional shortness of breath. The patient reports a history of rheumatoid arthritis and was previously a smoker.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals mild tenderness to palpation in the left wrist. Lung sounds are clear bilaterally. The solitary two centimeter nodule is visualized on chest radiography.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has rheumatoid arthritis and a solitary lung nodule. These findings are concerning for malignancy.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order a pulmonary function test and a PET CT. Recommend video assisted thoracoscopy. Schedule follow-up in one week to assess response to treatment and monitor for disease progression.
